Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix: Stock invoice save now creates batch records in Firebase

- Added api import and currentUser prop to Stock.js
- Updated handleInvoiceSave to async function with proper Firebase batch creation
- Uses api.addStockBatch\(\) to create records in stock_batches collection
- Calculates weighted average for existing stock updates
- Added currentUser prop pass-through in Dashboard.js

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
